headline: OpenAI proposes stake handoff to Trump administration amid regulatory pressure
body: OpenAI is in talks to give the Trump administration a 5% stake in the company as it navigates intensifying Washington pressure. This move signals how AI governance is becoming a direct political negotiation rather than a regulatory process. For healthcare AI, this matters because OpenAI's positioning with federal leadership could influence how AI deployment in clinical settings gets regulated, from EHR integration to FDA oversight of diagnostic tools. Healthcare organizations relying on OpenAI's models for clinical workflows should monitor how this political arrangement affects API pricing, data governance requirements, and compliance frameworks. The vendor landscape for healthcare AI may shift if government stakes in major AI companies become standard practice.
